ddls:
CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "department_head" TEXT /* Head of the department */,
  "department_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the department */,
  "department_building" TEXT /* Building where the department is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department organizing the event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "time_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the event (e.g., 5.5 hrs) */,
  "timing" TEXT /* Specific timing of the event (e.g., 10:30 - 4:00) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the event is held */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was last updated */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event */,
  "event_prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for attending the event */,
  "event_recurring" INTEGER /* Indicator for recurring events */,
  "event_url" TEXT /* URL for event registration or details */,
  "event_tags" TEXT /* Relevant tags or keywords for the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("location_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "location_capacity_type" TEXT /* Type of capacity (e.g., seats, people, or square feet) */,
  "location_availability" TEXT /* Availability of the location */,
  "location_map_url" TEXT /* URL for a map or directions to the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_series" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event series */,
  "series_name" TEXT /* Name of the event series */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event series */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the event series */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the event series */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event series was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event series was last updated */,
  "series_theme" TEXT /* Theme of the event series */,
  "series_description_short" TEXT /* Brief summary of the event series */,
  "series_hashtag" TEXT /* Official hashtag for social media promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resource */,
  "quantity_available" INTEGER /* Quantity available of the resource */,
  "resource_cost" REAL /* Cost of the resource per unit */,
  "resource_currency" TEXT /* Currency for the resource cost */,
  "resource_supplier" TEXT /* Supplier or vendor for the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_series_map" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event series */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_series_map_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_series_map_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES event_series ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_resource_map" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource */,
  "quantity_required" INTEGER /* Quantity required of the resource for the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_resource_map_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_resource_map_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES event_resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., organizer, participant, admin) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to */,
  "user_job_title" TEXT /* Job title or position of the user */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_bio" TEXT /* Brief bio or description of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered for the event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the participant (e.g., registered, attended, canceled) */,
  "participant_role" TEXT /* Role of the participant in the event */,
  "participant_status_update" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last status update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_participants_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_participants_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or feedback provided by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was created */,
  "review_rating_scale" TEXT /* Scale used for the rating */,
  "review_useful_count" INTEGER /* Count of users who found the review useful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_reviews_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_announcements" (
  "announcement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each announcement */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the announcement */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message or update about the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the announcement was made */,
  "announcement_priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the announcement */,
  "announcement_expiration" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the announcement expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("announcement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_announcements_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_announcements_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)
